name: cloud-stack-notes
description: Hugo powered Chinese technical blog with the Blowfish theme.

scripts.dev: git submodule update --init --recursive && hugo server --bind 0.0.0.0 --baseURL http://localhost:1313 --disableFastRender
scripts.serve: git submodule update --init --recursive && hugo server --bind 0.0.0.0 --baseURL http://localhost:1313 --disableFastRender
